TABLE.NAME: aiescape
TABLE.COMMENT: Main table for AI Escape Room activity instances

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this activity belongs to

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity name

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description shown on course page

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Format of the intro field

FIELD.NAME: premise
FIELD.COMMENT: Story or character premise given to the AI

FIELD.NAME: goal
FIELD.COMMENT: Completion condition description for the AI

FIELD.NAME: gamestyle
FIELD.COMMENT: narrative or persona

FIELD.NAME: personaname
FIELD.COMMENT: Character name for persona style

FIELD.NAME: gamemode
FIELD.COMMENT: multichoice, freetext, or combo

FIELD.NAME: choicesgood
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of good choices per turn in multichoice/combo mode

FIELD.NAME: choicesneutral
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of neutral choices per turn in multichoice/combo mode

FIELD.NAME: choicesbad
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of bad choices per turn in multichoice/combo mode

FIELD.NAME: steps
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of positive steps required to complete

FIELD.NAME: grade
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum grade points awarded on completion

FIELD.NAME: maxattempts
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum attempts allowed; -1 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: showprogress
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show step progress bar to student

FIELD.NAME: allowstudentreview
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether students can review their own past attempts

FIELD.NAME: partialscoreonquit
FIELD.COMMENT: Award partial score proportional to progress when student quits

FIELD.NAME: showpremise
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show the premise to students on the module page

FIELD.NAME: showgoal
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show the goal to students on the module page

FIELD.NAME: showchoicecounts
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show the good/neutral/bad choice counts to students on the module page

FIELD.NAME: previewhoverhints
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether teachers previewing the activity see the good/neutral/bad choice type on hover

FIELD.NAME: flagkeywords
FIELD.COMMENT: One keyword/phrase per line; flags free-text student responses containing a match for teacher review

FIELD.NAME: aiescape
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to aiescape table

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: inprogress, completed, abandoned

FIELD.NAME: stepstally
FIELD.COMMENT: Running tally of steps towards goal

FIELD.NAME: timecompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when attempt was completed

FIELD.NAME: ispreview
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether this attempt was made by a teacher/manager previewing the activity

FIELD.NAME: attemptid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to aiescape_attempts

FIELD.NAME: role
FIELD.COMMENT: user or assistant

FIELD.NAME: message
FIELD.COMMENT: Message content

FIELD.NAME: choicetype
FIELD.COMMENT: good, neutral, bad, or button label for user messages

FIELD.NAME: stepchange
FIELD.COMMENT: Step delta applied by this message: +1, 0, or -1

TABLE.NAME: aiescape_buttons
TABLE.COMMENT: Configurable secondary action buttons per activity

FIELD.NAME: aiescape
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to aiescape table

FIELD.NAME: label
FIELD.COMMENT: Button label shown to student

FIELD.NAME: prompt
FIELD.COMMENT: Prompt sent to AI when button is pressed

FIELD.NAME: defaultindex
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-5 index of global default button this was created from; null for custom buttons

FIELD.NAME: usagelimit
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum times this button may be used per attempt; null means unlimited

TABLE.NAME: aiescape_flags
TABLE.COMMENT: Messages flagged for teacher review by keyword match

FIELD.NAME: attemptid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to aiescape_attempts

FIELD.NAME: messageid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to aiescape_messages

FIELD.NAME: keyword
FIELD.COMMENT: The keyword/phrase that matched
